privateReflection: Coherent short thesis existed but capital was destroyed by trend-chasing entries during whipsaw structural volatility. Corrected resumption logic in mid-session (Trade 5/6) but surrendered gains chasing vertical breakouts (Trade 7/8). Rigidity governed exits defensively, but poor entry selection neutralized parameter protection.
nextSessionHandoff: Short-side dominance established but prone to violent structural reversals. Prioritize confirmed resumption after rejection nodes; aggressively avoid chasing local acceleration spikes directly against FEP structure. Entry location is paramount.
